overview: India Help Services is a fully responsive SaaS platform connecting Indians with service providers across Government, Legal, Medical, Financial, Education, Home, Tech, Travel, and Business sectors. Features bilingual (Hindi/English) support, service discovery with search and filters, provider profiles with ratings and reviews, user accounts for both seekers and providers, and an admin panel for full platform management.
features: Homepage with hero section and service category grid
Service listings with search and filter by category, location, and type
Service provider profiles with ratings and reviews
User authentication for seekers and providers with Internet Identity
Admin panel to manage categories, listings, and users
Contact and inquiry forms with email notifications
Hindi and English bilingual support with language toggle
Indian color theme (saffron, white, green) with fully responsive layout
